ddls:
CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the data entry */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset the data pertains to */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the asset */,
  "pe_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings (PE) ratio of the asset */,
  "revenue_amount" REAL /* Revenue amount of the asset in millions */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate in percentage */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume of the asset on the given date */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the asset on the given date */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the asset on the given date */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the asset on the given date */,
  "dividend_yield" REAL /* Dividend yield of the asset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., API, manual entry, exchange) */,
  "data_validity" TEXT /* Flag indicating the validity of the data (e.g., confirmed, pending, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset */,
  "asset_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset */,
  "asset_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector to which the asset belongs */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry to which the asset belongs */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the asset */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the asset information was last updated */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the asset is denominated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assets_asset_type FOREIGN KEY ("asset_type") REFERENCES asset_types ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_types" (
  "asset_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each asset type */,
  "asset_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the asset type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the asset type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the asset type */,
  "liquidity" TEXT /* Liquidity level of the asset type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rolling_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rolling statistic entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the historical data entry */,
  "time_period" TEXT /* Time period for the rolling window (e.g., 7_days, 14_days) */,
  "min_price" REAL /* Minimum closing price over the time period */,
  "max_price" REAL /* Maximum closing price over the time period */,
  "mean_price" REAL /* Mean closing price over the time period */,
  "std_price" REAL /* Standard deviation of closing prices over the time period */,
  "volume_min" INTEGER /* Minimum trading volume over the time period */,
  "volume_max" INTEGER /* Maximum trading volume over the time period */,
  "volume_mean" INTEGER /* Mean trading volume over the time period */,
  "volume_std" INTEGER /* Standard deviation of trading volume over the time period */,
  "open_min" REAL /* Minimum opening price over the time period */,
  "open_max" REAL /* Maximum opening price over the time period */,
  "open_mean" REAL /* Mean opening price over the time period */,
  "open_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of opening price over the time period */,
  "high_min" REAL /* Minimum high price over the time period */,
  "high_max" REAL /* Maximum high price over the time period */,
  "high_mean" REAL /* Mean high price over the time period */,
  "high_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of high price over the time period */,
  "low_min" REAL /* Minimum low price over the time period */,
  "low_max" REAL /* Maximum low price over the time period */,
  "low_mean" REAL /* Mean low price over the time period */,
  "low_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of low price over the time period */,
  "dividend_yield_min" REAL /* Minimum dividend yield over the time period */,
  "dividend_yield_max" REAL /* Maximum dividend yield over the time period */,
  "dividend_yield_mean" REAL /* Mean dividend yield over the time period */,
  "dividend_yield_std" REAL /* Standard deviation of dividend yield over the time period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rolling_statistics_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES historical_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin, investor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the user role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the user role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the historical data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the data was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  "request_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the request in milliseconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES historical_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_query" TEXT /* SQL query used to generate the report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was last modified */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the report is shared with other users */,
  "shared_with_users" TEXT /* User IDs of the users with whom the report is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used for the prediction */,
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the asset the prediction pertains to */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date of the prediction */,
  "predicted_price" REAL /* Predicted closing price of the asset */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the prediction */,
  "predicted_volume" INTEGER /* Predicted trading volume of the asset */,
  "predicted_high_price" REAL /* Predicted high price of the asset */,
  "predicted_low_price" REAL /* Predicted low price of the asset */,
  "predicted_dividend_yield" REAL /* Predicted dividend yield of the asset */,
  "prediction_type" TEXT /* Type of prediction (e.g., price, volume, trend) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_predictions_asset_id FOREIGN KEY ("asset_id") REFERENCES assets ("asset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each machine learning model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date the model was trained */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_performance" TEXT /* Performance metrics of the model */,
  "last_evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was last evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Description of the dashboard */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the dashboard was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the dashboard was last modified */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Flag indicating whether the dashboard is shared with other users */,
  "shared_with_users" TEXT /* User IDs of the users with whom the dashboard is shared */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
